## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Felipe Lopes (potential hire) and Marcel Santilli (co-founder) to discuss FWD.digital's business, vision, and potential role for Felipe.](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FWD.digital is a fast-growing AI-powered marketing services company, recently raising a $12M Series A at $80M valuation](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Company combines high-margin services with proprietary AI/ML platform, targeting $22M ARR this year](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Felipe has strong startup founder experience; Marcel sees him as potential key hire to help scale engineering/product](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Competitive offer discussed: \~$300k base, 40 basis points equity (\~$320k at current valuation)](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)

## Topics

### Felipe's Background

  - [Co-founded Uncor Alert (2013), acquired by Meltwater](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Currently co-founder/CTO of Mighty Health (6 years, $12M raised)](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Strong technical background, experience as startup founder and scaling products](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### FWD.digital Business Model

  - [AI-powered marketing services (content, SEO, etc.) with proprietary tech platform](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [High margins (71% gross, 28% EBITDA in Q4) despite services focus](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)
  - [Rapid growth: $6.2M ARR, just closed $12M Series A at $80M valuation](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Strong demand: 54 deals in pipeline, closed 5 deals ($1M ARR) in past week](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)

### Technology & Product Vision

  - [Built proprietary workflow engine and AI/ML models for marketing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Long-term vision to expand into broader knowledge work automation](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Potential to monetize platform/APIs separately from services in future](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2717.0)

### Team & Culture

  - [Small, high-caliber team with "founder mentality"](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Focus on work-life balance while maintaining ambitious growth targets](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [Marcel emphasizes kind, ambitious culture and competitive compensation](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)

### Potential Role & Offer for Felipe

  - [Looking for technical leader with startup scaling experience](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2899.0)
  - [Discussed potential offer: \~$300k base salary, 40 basis points equity](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)
  - [Emphasized high growth potential could lead to significant equity upside](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to connect with Daniel (co-founder) and send written offer to Felipe](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=3547.0)
  - [Felipe to consider offer and reach out with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=3306.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussion once Felipe has had time to evaluate opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/-vrhFWasHmGqHXusbpMyXxSsPyACB3wF?tab=summary&timestamp=3306.0)
